title: Open View Act II.b Rough Sketch
content:
Open View Act II.b Rough Sketch

Mom and Dad attempt to reconcile and it works for a little while. They talk about having another kid.

Auntie and uncle stop by on their way from dinner to check on mom. And deliver some news.

In the basement, they find their new son still alive. Mom confesses to the divorce and the abortion.

Leader’s parents arrive with police. They demand to see their son.

They find their drugged son.

The police arrive with Sis in tow.

The police find the explosives in sis’s room.

The house shuts down.

The instructions are delivered. The crack is revealed again.

The new son is killed. Sends mom into the deepest darkest despair.

The group, first in disbelief can’t really get their acts together, and the arguing does quickly almost become violent.

The police take charge.

Everyone agrees to stick together.
context: From document: Open View Act II.b Rough Sketch — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
